2605.24613.title: Guarded Repair for Harm-Aware Post-hoc Replacement of LLM Mathematical Reasoning
2605.24613.paper_summary: Post-hoc repair of LLM mathematical reasoning introduces an asymmetric risk: fixing an incorrect reasoning trace is useful, but replacing a trace that was already correct can be harmful. We study this problem under a selective replacement setting, where a system must decide whether a repaired candidate is safer than preserving the original cached trace. We present GuardedRepair, a guarded best-of-N repair framework that diagnoses cached reasoning traces, selectively triggers repair, and accepts answer-changing candidates only when deterministic verification guards support replacement. The framework combines lightweight symbolic checks, surface semantic-risk diagnostics, bounded candidate generation, and conservative acceptance policies. On the full GSM8K test set, where the initial reasoner already achieves 95.60% accuracy, GuardedRepair improves final accuracy to 96.89%, fixing 17 of 58 remaining errors without measured broken-correct cases in the main run. On a weak-reasoner ASDiv setting, accuracy improves from 78.40% to 87.60%. Direct regeneration baselines show that this gain is not explained by stronger-model re-solving alone: re-solving all GSM8K examples lowers accuracy to 93.03% and breaks 47 initially correct answers. Additional analyses show that guarded repair substantially improves the fixed/broken tradeoff, while also revealing that replacement risk is reduced rather than eliminated. These results support viewing post-hoc repair as harm-aware selective replacement rather than unconstrained re-solving.
2605.24613.paper_summary_zh: 後期修復 LLM 數學推理引入了一種不對稱風險：修正不正確的推理痕跡是有用的，但替換已經正確的痕跡可能會造成傷害。<lb/>我們在選擇性替換的設定下研究這個問題，系統必須決定修復的候選者是否比保留原始快取痕跡更安全。<lb/>我們提出了 GuardedRepair，一個受保護的最佳 N 修復框架，該框架診斷快取的推理痕跡，選擇性觸發修復，並且僅在確定性驗證守衛支持替換時接受改變答案的候選者。<lb/>該框架結合了輕量級符號檢查、表面語義風險診斷、有界候選生成和保守接受政策。<lb/>在完整的 GSM8K 測試集上，初始推理器已經達到 95.60% 的準確率，GuardedRepair 將最終準確率提高到 96.89%，修復了 58 個剩餘錯誤中的 17 個，主運行中沒有測量到破損-正確的案例。<lb/>在弱推理器 ASDiv 設定中，準確率從 78.40% 提高到 87.60%。<lb/>直接再生基準顯示，這一增益並不是僅由於更強模型的重新解決所解釋：重新解決所有 GSM8K 範例將準確率降低到 93.03%，並破壞了 47 個最初正確的答案。<lb/>額外分析顯示，受保護的修復顯著改善了固定/破損的權衡，同時也揭示了替換風險是減少而不是消除的。<lb/>這些結果支持將後期修復視為意識到傷害的選擇性替換，而不是不受限制的重新解決。
2605.24613.author: Haizhou Xia et.al.
